creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

thank you for your message.  I just checked the information you provided.

Unfortunately I do not think this qualifies for an entry on our website.
 Your website cleary states that dedicated hosting is only available
with Linux (CentOS). FreeBSD is not even mentioned on your site (except
for a support article).

So unless we can get some information on how your customers are able to
use FreeBSD on your servers we will have to close this PR.

Regards

jkois

-- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de


,
